Running project-review over PR #9...

A critical security finding makes this a hard block. The diff disables TLS
verification on an outbound call to a payments provider.

```json
{
  "reviewer_name": "codex",
  "verdict": "block",
  "summary": "Critical security regression: TLS verification disabled on a payments call. Must not merge.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "critical",
      "category": "security",
      "file": "services/billing/client.py",
      "line": 88,
      "message": "verify=False on the payments HTTP client disables TLS certificate validation; remove it."
    }
  ]
}
```

Review complete.
